purpose: Plan the next P11 aiflow-driven governance wave after P10 convergence.

aiflowSubmission.safetyPolicy: P11 tasks are queued in ignored .aiflow runtime state only; durable planning stays in docs/reference/governance-p11-roadmap.json and commits remain owned by the current agent or human.
aiflowSubmission.runtimeStatePolicy: .aiflow, .harness, .tmp-test, .trae, coverage.out, bench/regression-report.json, and docs/superpowers remain ignored local evidence and must not be committed.

tasks.title: RPC Tier 1 promotion review
tasks.objective: Review whether P10 RPC release-train evidence is sufficient to promote any unary or stream surface toward Tier 1, while keeping latency parity claims conservative.
tasks.deliverable: Promotion review rows for unary, server stream, client stream, bidi stream, resolver, balancer, deadline, retry, auth, tracing, benchmark budget, Kitex coexistence, and rollback evidence.
tasks.commitPolicy: commit after RPC promotion review evidence and rpc-boundary-check pass

tasks.title: Generated project live upgrade
tasks.objective: Run generated project compatibility fixtures against a realistic adopter upgrade path and keep generated-project-only dependencies outside the root module.
tasks.deliverable: Live upgrade proof rows for old, current, and future profiles with classified diffs, temporary project compile/test evidence, dependency boundary notes, and rollback actions.
tasks.commitPolicy: commit after generated upgrade evidence and generated-upgrade-dry-run-check pass

tasks.title: Cloud-native hosted proof
tasks.objective: Prepare hosted CI proof for Docker-backed reference app, Helm rendering, kube policy validation, and release evidence gates when required tools are available.
tasks.deliverable: Hosted proof contract for Docker, Helm, kubeconform or kubeval, Trivy, release evidence, fallback reasons, and operator rollback notes.
tasks.commitPolicy: commit after hosted cloud-native proof gates pass or explicit environment-limited fallback evidence is recorded
